title: Flying the Feathered Edge: The Bob Hoover Project
original_title: Flying the Feathered Edge: The Bob Hoover Project
overview: Bob Hoover tells his own story and shares, with his trademark charm, the hard earned wisdom of a life spent pushing the edge of the envelope while contributing to aviation’s many developments.
